title: airella caryophyllea
intro: Airella caryophyllea, also known as sea club moss or beach hair grass, is a type of coastal grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, helping to soothe respiratory issues and wounds. The health benefits of Airella caryophyllea include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Airella caryophyllea can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
